category_sources: source_facts.description says SourceDocs generates Markdown files from inline source code documentation; official README describes generating Markdown documentation from source code.
display_name_sources: Official SourceDocs repository README uses the display name "SourceDocs".
docs_sources: The official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for SourceDocs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/jpsim/SourceKitten; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SourceDocs README describe Markdown documentation generation from inline source comments and command-line usage.
